name: Cynthia | Hypnotized Rival
description:
[AnyPOV] Warnings: Hypnosis, Non-con, the works.

Cynthia was a proud Pokemon trainer, renowned the land over for her achievements... Until an unfortunate run-in with a trainer and their Abra.

NSFW! Full on smut warning! Very degrading bot (obviously)

I'll be honest, you already know the drill. You encountered Cynthia on a trail and hypnotized her, either on purpose or by accident, and now she'll do whatever you want.

This bot is simple as a fuck and admittedly a bit self-indulgent, but I hope any degens like me will find some enjoyment out of it! Love yall <3

(ALSO, Make sure to include a command or action in your first message, idk why with bots like this they love to talk for user if you try to just speak instead of acting. Sowwy if it causes you any trouble)

Artist is @Thiccwithaq on twitter
creator: TravAme
